Container.Name: kick-drops-miner
Container.Overview: Headless Kick.com drops miner. Watches configured Kick channels for their target minutes, then rotates to the next — no GUI, logs to the Docker log. Seed /config/cookies/kick.com.json with a logged-in session_token, and set channels via the KDM_CHANNELS variable or a /config/config.json file.
Container.Description: Headless Kick.com drops miner (no noVNC/GUI). One long-lived Chromium, real watch-time accounting, auto-recovery, clean shutdown. Logs to stdout.

Config.Name: Config dir
Config.Description: Holds config.json, cookies/ and chrome_data/. Seed cookies/kick.com.json with a logged-in session_token.

Config.Name: KDM_CHANNELS
Config.Description: Channels to watch: comma- or newline-separated 'url' or 'url=minutes', e.g. https://kick.com/a=120, https://kick.com/b. Optional if you provide /config/config.json.

Config.Name: KDM_HEADLESS
Config.Description: 0 = headful Chrome under Xvfb (most robust vs. Cloudflare, recommended). 1 = true headless.
